name: Codex Entry
description: Player-safe glossary entry. Diegetic explanation of a term, entity, place, or concept that players can read without spoilers. Written as an in-world scholar would write it. Derived from canon by Codex Curator, validated by Gatekeeper for spoiler leaks.

fields.name: term
fields.description: The word, name, or phrase being defined

fields.name: short_definition
fields.description: One-sentence definition for quick reference (max 100 chars)

fields.name: full_entry
fields.description: Complete diegetic explanation in in-world voice

fields.name: pronunciation
fields.description: Phonetic guide if term is unusual

fields.name: first_appearance
fields.description: Section anchor where players first encounter this term

fields.name: canon_source
fields.description: Reference to source canon pack and entry

fields.name: spoiler_omissions
fields.description: Canon facts intentionally omitted (for Gatekeeper reference, not exported)

fields.name: diegetic_source
fields.description: In-world attribution (e.g., 'From the Chronicles of the Third Age')

states.name: Draft
states.description: Entry is being written by Codex Curator

states.name: Review
states.description: Entry is being validated for spoilers and style

states.name: Validated
states.description: Entry has passed Gatekeeper check, ready for export

states.name: Published
states.description: Entry has been exported in a release
